name: Telegram
description: Connect Telegram chats to your Osaurus agents

tools.name: telegram_send
tools.description: Send a message to a Telegram chat. Supports text, markdown, and reply_markup for inline keyboards.

tools.name: telegram_get_chat_history
tools.description: Retrieve recent messages from the plugin's local message log for a given Telegram chat.

routes.name: health
routes.description: Health check — returns webhook registration status
